mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user_role SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_user_role (user_id, role_id) VALUES
(#{userId}, #{roleId})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE deleted = 0, update_time = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT role_id FROM sys_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY role_id ASC
